articles.full_text:
Ice Tableau Created At Ayodhya Temple Amid Heatwave
A special aarti was performed at Shri Siddha Peeth Kshireswar Nath Mahadev Temple in Ayodhya before a divine tableau made entirely of ice, created to offer relief from the intense summer heat and soaring temperatures.
